description_long: This cabinetry set features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of upper wall cabinets and a lower base unit. The upper section consists of three horizontally aligned wall cabinets with a wood-textured finish and subtle finger groove handles. The lower base unit includes a countertop with an integrated electric cooktop and a stainless steel sink, as well as multiple drawers and cabinet doors for storage. The cabinetry is finished in a muted, light wood tone with vertical grain patterns, and the countertop appears to be a slightly darker laminate or composite material. The base unit has open shelving on one side, and the overall construction suggests a blend of engineered wood and metal hardware. This cabinetry is suitable for use in urban kitchens, break rooms, or communal spaces.
description: A modern kitchen cabinetry set with upper wall cabinets and a lower base unit featuring a cooktop, sink, drawers, and wood-textured finishes. The design is sleek, with finger groove handles and a muted color palette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cabinetry set, including the upper wall cabinets, lower base unit with cooktop, sink, drawers, and doors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinetry and the thickness of the countertop, with the cooktop and sink visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels of the cabinetry and the open shelving on the base unit, with no visible hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the vertical grain of the wood finish and the arrangement of the upper and lower cabinets.
attribute_cabinet_type: base cabinet and wall cabinet set
